visual_dna_anchor: Back-lit soft diffused lighting at warm 3200K golden hour. Sun-warmed wood and natural linen surfaces with matte natural finish. Lifestyle candid documentary photography with Kodak Gold 200 warmth. Color temperature matching lavender #E8E0F0 and blue-indigo #2B2A8C with teal #5FC0D4 accents. Mood: joyful, nostalgic, warm, approachable, playful. AVOID: clinical, sterile, stock_photo_aesthetic, cold, corporate. No text, no logos, no watermarks.

brand_anchors.personality: Your Best Backup — the trusted friend who always has what you need in their bag
brand_anchors.vision: As essential and recognizable as the sugar packet, present at every table
brand_story_scenes: A first date over coffee and tiramisu
A childhood birthday party with pizza and ice cream
A family gathering where someone's famous mac and cheese takes center stage
brand_anchors.emotional_ladder: Single Ingredient → Can Ingest Dairy → Less Stress → Empowerment → Joy
brand_anchors.key_tension: You shouldn't have to choose between comfort and enjoyment

visual_family_constraint.description: Every prompt includes this block verbatim to enforce consistency across independent API calls
visual_family_constraint.color_grade: Warm golden highlights (Kodak Gold 200 warmth). Shadows tinted with subtle lavender (#D0C6E0) — NOT neutral grey shadows. Overall warm but not orange. The lavender shadow tone is the signature that makes every image feel 'DairyAssure'.
visual_family_constraint.film_stock: Kodak Gold 200 for all lifestyle images. Fujifilm Pro 400H only for the morning product-intro shot.
visual_family_constraint.lighting_rig: Back-lit primary with soft fill from camera-left. Color temperature 3200K. Slight sun flare permitted. NO harsh directional shadows. NO overhead fluorescent. NO flash.
visual_family_constraint.product_cameo_rule: In every lifestyle scene (not product-hero shots), a single DairyAssure stick pack sits on the table/surface — NOT as the subject, but as casually present as a sugar packet would be. It's just THERE, part of the table setting. Do not call attention to it. Do not center it. It's background furniture.
visual_family_constraint.people_casting: Diverse, 25-40, real people energy. Not models. If hands appear across multiple shots, they should suggest the same warmth — no manicured editorial hands, no rough worker hands. Natural, cared-for, lived-in hands. Mixed skin tones across the set.
visual_family_constraint.emotional_through_line: Every image answers one question: 'What does it look like when you can say YES to dairy again?' The feeling is relief-becoming-joy. Not the moment of anxiety. Not the moment of taking medicine. The moment AFTER — when you're just... enjoying it.

prompts.purpose: Hero product showcase — the product as 'your best backup', casual and confident on a warm surface

scene.description: A warm, sun-drenched kitchen counter moment. The product from the reference image sits confidently on a honey-toned butcher block surface. Two individual stick packs are casually scattered beside the pouch — one slightly overlapping the other, the way you'd toss them down after pulling them from your bag. Behind: a ceramic bowl of fresh strawberries and a half-full glass of milk catch the golden light. A folded natural linen napkin adds texture. The scene feels like someone just set down their morning essentials — keys, coffee, DairyAssure. It belongs here.
scene.location: warm kitchen counter near a window
background_elements: soft lavender-tinted wall (#D8D0E8) behind the scene
gentle sun flare from window at camera-right
warm golden light washing across the butcher block

subject.description: The product from the reference image. MUST match the reference image exactly. DO NOT regenerate the product — PRESERVE all packaging details including the cow logo, the DairyAssure wordmark, the lavender color, and 'Preservative-free Lactase' text. The product is the confident anchor of the scene but not overly staged — it looks like it LIVES here, like a sugar packet on a café table.
subject.pose: pouch standing upright naturally (not perfectly straight — slight casual lean), stick packs tossed casually beside

style.mood: quiet confidence, Sunday morning ease, 'your best backup just sitting on the counter' energy. This is what Taste Joy looks like before the meal even starts.

technical.depth_of_field: medium — product sharp, background softly out of focus

composition.negative_space: product occupies center 60% of frame, breathing room on all sides, no text overlay needed

materials.secondary: white ceramic bowl, glass of milk, natural linen napkin
materials.texture: warm natural wood grain, matte ceramic, soft linen folds

lighting.direction: back_lit from camera-right with soft fill from camera-left
lighting.shadow_color: shadows tinted with subtle lavender (#D0C6E0), NOT neutral grey

quality.sharpness: crisp on product, progressively softer toward edges
quality.film_grain: slight — visible but not gritty, Kodak Gold 200 character
quality.post_processing: warm golden color grade, lavender-tinted shadows, natural skin of light on surfaces
quality.imperfections: slight lens warmth at edges, one strawberry slightly turned, nothing perfectly arranged

text_overlay.content_preview: N/A — text in separate left column

prompts.purpose: Mobile hero — tighter portrait crop of product, same warm butcher block world

scene.description: Tighter version of the hero product scene. The product from the reference image on the SAME honey-toned butcher block surface as the desktop hero. One stick pack leaning casually against the pouch. The glass of milk is partially visible at the edge of frame. A folded natural linen napkin in the lower corner. Warm golden light from a window. This MUST feel like a tighter crop of the exact same photo session as the desktop hero — same surface, same light, same color grade, same world.
scene.location: same warm kitchen counter as desktop hero
background_elements: glass of milk partially visible at edge

subject.description: The product from the reference image. MUST match the reference image exactly. PRESERVE all packaging details. Tighter framing — product fills more of the frame than desktop version.
subject.pose: pouch upright with slight casual lean, one stick pack leaning against it

style.mood: quiet confidence, the 'best backup' just sitting there ready. Taste Joy energy.

composition.negative_space: product fills center 70% of frame, portrait orientation

materials.primary_surface: sun-warmed honey-toned butcher block — SAME as desktop hero
materials.secondary: natural linen napkin, glass of milk at edge

lighting.direction: back_lit from camera-right with soft fill

quality.post_processing: warm golden color grade, lavender-tinted shadows

prompts.purpose: Product intro — the 'simple solutions only' moment: hand casually sprinkling powder onto morning cereal

scene.description: A real morning moment. A person's hand tears open a DairyAssure stick pack over a bowl of cereal with milk. The pouch sits on the same honey-toned butcher block surface nearby. A coffee mug steams gently. A morning newspaper or phone is pushed to the side. This is the brand's 'Simple Solutions Only' pillar made visual — no planning required, just tear and sprinkle. The scene answers: 'what if relief was as simple as the dairy itself?' The stick pack is being used as casually as adding sugar to coffee. It BELONGS in this morning routine.
background_elements: morning sun streaming through window, slightly cooler than hero but still warm

subject.description: The product from the reference image. MUST match the reference image exactly. DO NOT regenerate the product. PRESERVE all packaging details. A natural hand (diverse, un-manicured, real) tearing open a stick pack, with powder just beginning to sprinkle down toward the cereal bowl. The pouch sits nearby on the counter.
subject.pose: hand tearing stick pack naturally, powder beginning to fall, pouch standing nearby

style.mood: effortless morning routine energy. This is what 'designed for spontaneity' looks like. No planning, no pill case, no water needed — just tear, sprinkle, eat. The ease IS the message.

technical.depth_of_field: shallow — sharp on the stick pack and falling powder, soft background

composition.focus_point: the stick pack being torn and the powder sprinkling — this is the magic moment

materials.primary_surface: sun-warmed honey-toned butcher block — SAME surface as hero
materials.secondary: white ceramic bowl with cereal, ceramic coffee mug, natural linen
materials.texture: warm natural wood grain, matte ceramic

lighting.color_temperature: 4000K warm morning — slightly cooler than hero golden hour but still warm

quality.sharpness: crisp on stick pack and powder, soft bokeh on background
quality.film_grain: slight — Fujifilm Pro 400H character, slightly cooler grain than Kodak Gold
quality.post_processing: warm but clean morning color grade, lavender-tinted shadows, natural

prompts.purpose: Brand story scene 1 — 'A first date over coffee and tiramisu' (directly from brand story)

scene.description: A first date at a cozy Italian café. Two people sitting across from each other at a small round table. Between them: two espresso cups and a shared plate of tiramisu with two forks. One person is mid-laugh, the other is smiling while reaching for the tiramisu. A DairyAssure stick pack sits on the table beside the espresso cups — as unremarkable as a sugar packet. It's just THERE, part of the table, noticed by no one. The magic of this image is the total absence of anxiety — this is the 'after' moment. The moment where you said YES to the date, YES to the tiramisu, and didn't think twice.
scene.location: cozy Italian café, small round table by a window
background_elements: warm café interior in soft bokeh
window light mixing with interior warmth

subject.description: Two people (diverse, 28-35, NOT models — real date energy) sharing tiramisu and espresso. One is mid-laugh. Focus on the CONNECTION between them, with the food as the facilitator. A single DairyAssure stick pack rests on the table beside the espresso cups — casual, unremarkable, like a sugar packet. Do NOT make the stick pack prominent. It's background furniture.
subject.position: center — the table and the two people across from each other
subject.pose: candid mid-conversation, one reaching for tiramisu, genuine laughter

style.mood: first-date butterflies mixed with total comfort. The anxiety of 'can I eat this?' is completely absent. This is what 'you shouldn't have to choose between comfort and enjoyment' LOOKS like.

technical.depth_of_field: shallow — faces and food sharp, background creamy bokeh

composition.angle: eye_level, slightly to the side — voyeuristic candid, like you're at the next table
composition.focus_point: the shared tiramisu and the laughing face

materials.primary_surface: small round café table — wood or marble bistro style
materials.secondary: espresso cups, tiramisu plate, forks, napkins

lighting.type: mixed — natural window light and warm pendant
lighting.direction: side_lit from window, warm fill from pendant above

quality.sharpness: crisp on faces and food, dreamy background
quality.film_grain: slight — Kodak Gold 200, adds the romance
quality.post_processing: warm golden highlights, lavender-tinted shadows, slight vignette
quality.imperfections: natural laugh lines, slightly messy hair, tiramisu already partly eaten — real

prompts.purpose: Brand story scene 2 — 'A family gathering where someone's famous mac and cheese takes center stage' (directly from brand story)

scene.description: A multigenerational family gathering around a dining table. The centerpiece: a big steaming dish of homemade mac and cheese — golden, bubbly, fresh from the oven. Hands are reaching in with a serving spoon. A grandmother is smiling at a grandchild. A parent is serving a plate. The table has the beautiful chaos of a real family dinner — mismatched glasses, a basket of bread, cloth napkins half-unfolded. A single DairyAssure stick pack sits on the table near one person's plate — as unremarkable as a salt shaker. The emotional core: EVERYONE is at the table. No one had to sit this one out. This is 'Connection' — one of the brand's core values — made visible.
background_elements: family photos on wall in soft blur
warm chandelier or pendant light above

subject.description: Multigenerational family (3 generations visible, diverse, 3-5 people) gathered around mac and cheese. Genuine interaction — not everyone looking at camera. Grandmother, parent, child at minimum. A DairyAssure stick pack on the table near one person's plate — barely visible, just THERE. NOT the subject.
subject.position: center — the mac and cheese dish as the anchor, people around it
subject.pose: serving, reaching, laughing, natural family dinner chaos

style.mood: the warm chaos of a family dinner where everyone said yes and no one is missing. This is what 'celebrating life's moments — big and small — where dairy plays a role' LOOKS like. The mac and cheese IS the center stage. Connection, inclusivity, accessibility — all visible in one frame.

technical.depth_of_field: medium — enough to see multiple people

composition.angle: slightly_above_table_level — you can see the mac and cheese and the people
composition.focus_point: the mac and cheese dish and the hands serving it
composition.negative_space: none — filled with family and food and warmth

materials.primary_surface: wooden dining table with natural linen table runner
materials.secondary: ceramic baking dish, mismatched glasses, cloth napkins, bread basket

lighting.type: warm indoor evening — chandelier/pendant mixed with candles on table
lighting.direction: overhead warm with candle fill on faces
lighting.color_temperature: 2800K warm evening — deepest warmth in the page's emotional gradient
lighting.shadow_color: shadows tinted with lavender (#D0C6E0) — deeper and richer than hero

quality.sharpness: crisp on food and nearest faces, progressive softness
quality.film_grain: slight-to-moderate — Kodak Gold 200 in evening light gets grainier, and that's perfect
quality.post_processing: deep warm golden, lavender shadows, rich and intimate color grade
quality.imperfections: motion blur on reaching hands, slightly crooked napkins, real family dinner energy

prompts.purpose: Brand story scene — 'gelato in Rome' (directly from brand story, matches Maria L. testimonial)

scene.description: A hand holding a gelato cone against a warm Roman street. Cobblestone, ochre-colored buildings, a trattoria awning. Late afternoon sun. The gelato has two scoops — pistachio (green) and stracciatella (cream with chocolate flecks). A DairyAssure stick pack is tucked into the person's other hand alongside their phone — the way you'd casually hold a sugar packet you grabbed from the counter. NOT prominent. Just there. This is 'Travel Without Limits' made real. The visual says: you took DairyAssure to Italy. You had gelato every day. Zero issues.

subject.description: A hand (natural, diverse skin, 25-35) holding a gelato cone proudly. The other hand loosely holds a phone and a DairyAssure stick pack — barely noticeable, like holding a receipt. The gelato is the hero, NOT the product.
subject.position: center — gelato cone as the hero
subject.pose: hand raised slightly showing off the gelato, casual pride

style.mood: la dolce vita, vacation freedom, the moment you realize you can eat ANYTHING on this trip. This is what 'Travel Without Limits' looks like.

technical.depth_of_field: shallow — gelato sharp, Rome is warm bokeh

materials.secondary: waffle cone, cobblestone texture in background

lighting.direction: back_lit with warm rim light on gelato and hand

quality.film_grain: slight — Kodak Gold 200 travel snap energy
quality.post_processing: warm golden, lavender shadows, slight lens flare from sun, travel memory feel

prompts.purpose: Brand story scene — 'first date tiramisu' reimagined as dinner party dessert (matches James T. testimonial: 'no more declining dessert')

scene.description: A dinner party table from slightly above. The moment of dessert: a beautiful tiramisu is being served. Multiple hands with forks reaching toward slices on plates. Wine glasses with red wine, candles burning low, cloth napkins. A DairyAssure stick pack sits on the table beside someone's wine glass — unremarkable as a matchbook. The emotional core: 'no more declining dessert at dinner parties.' Everyone said yes. The confidence to just... eat the dessert. That's freedom.
background_elements: friends in soft focus at edges

subject.description: Tiramisu being served at a dinner party. Multiple hands reaching for plates. Diverse group (seen only as hands and arms). One DairyAssure stick pack on the table — NOT centered, NOT the subject. Just part of the table like a sugar packet.
subject.position: center — the tiramisu as the hero
subject.pose: hands reaching, serving, the communal moment of dessert

style.mood: the confidence to say YES to dessert. Freedom. 'When your gut feels good, you feel good.' This is the empowerment rung of the brand ladder.

materials.secondary: ceramic plates, wine glasses, candles, silver forks

lighting.direction: overhead warm with candle side fill
lighting.shadow_color: shadows tinted with lavender (#D0C6E0) — deep and intimate

quality.sharpness: crisp on tiramisu and nearest hands
quality.film_grain: slight-to-moderate — Kodak Gold 200 in low light
quality.post_processing: warm golden candlelight, lavender shadows, intimate

prompts.purpose: Brand story scene — 'A childhood birthday party with pizza and ice cream' (directly from brand story, matches Rachel S. testimonial)

scene.description: A child's birthday party moment. A kid (7-9 years old) holding an ice cream cone with both hands, face lit up with pure joy, maybe a smear of ice cream on their cheek. Birthday party context: streamers, a half-eaten cake visible behind, other kids in soft focus. Outdoor backyard party, golden afternoon sun. The emotional core from the brand story: 'A childhood birthday party with pizza and ice cream.' From the testimonial: 'My kids can have ice cream at birthday parties again. As a parent, that means everything.' No product visible in this one — the JOY is the product. This image is the top of the brand ladder: Joy.
background_elements: half-eaten cake on a table behind
other kids playing in soft focus

subject.description: One child (7-9, any ethnicity) holding an ice cream cone with both hands. Genuine smile, possibly ice cream on cheek/chin. The universal image of childhood joy reclaimed.
subject.pose: holding ice cream with two hands, mid-lick or just smiling at it, pure kid joy

style.mood: childhood birthday party magic. The moment a parent sees their kid just being a normal kid at a party, eating ice cream like everyone else. This is the TOP of the brand ladder: JOY. Not relief. Not management. JOY.

technical.depth_of_field: shallow — child sharp, party is warm bokeh

composition.angle: child's eye level — shoot from their height

lighting.direction: back_lit with sun creating rim light around child's hair
lighting.color_temperature: 3200K golden hour — warmest and most nostalgic

quality.film_grain: slight — Kodak Gold 200, summer Polaroid energy
quality.post_processing: warm golden, lavender shadows, nostalgic summer memory color grade
quality.imperfections: slight sun flare, ice cream dripping, messy face — REAL kid moment

prompts.purpose: The 'pizza night is back' moment — couple sharing real pizza (matches Chris P. testimonial)

scene.description: Overhead view of a pizza box open on a coffee table. Real pepperoni pizza with melting mozzarella, a slice being pulled with that gorgeous cheese stretch. Two people visible by their hands — one pulling the slice, the other reaching for a napkin. Two drinks beside the box. A cozy blanket edge visible. A DairyAssure stick pack on the table near the napkins — unremarkable, part of the furniture, like a TV remote. The testimonial: 'Pizza night is back on the menu. My wife and I can finally share a real pizza again.' This is the reclaiming. Not a replacement pizza. Not dairy-free cheese. REAL pizza. REAL mozzarella. That's the 'no compromise' pillar.
scene.location: cozy living room coffee table, evening
background_elements: cozy blanket at edge of frame

subject.description: Open pizza box with pepperoni pizza (real mozzarella cheese pull moment). Two pairs of hands — one pulling a slice with cheese stretching, one reaching for napkin. A DairyAssure stick pack near the napkins — NOT prominent, just part of the coffee table landscape.
subject.position: center — pizza box fills most of the square frame
subject.pose: cheese pull moment, hands reaching, casual Saturday night

style.mood: pizza night is BACK. The feeling of getting something back you thought you'd lost. Casual, cozy, 'we can finally do this again' energy. No compromise.

technical.depth_of_field: medium — most of table in focus

composition.focus_point: the cheese pull and the pizza

materials.primary_surface: wooden coffee table — warm tone, same family as butcher block
materials.secondary: pizza box, napkins, glasses, blanket edge

lighting.direction: overhead warm ambient, slight side fill from table lamp

quality.sharpness: crisp on pizza and cheese pull
quality.film_grain: slight — Kodak Gold 200 indoor evening grain
quality.post_processing: warm golden, lavender shadows, cozy Saturday night grade

prompts.purpose: Step 1 icon — 'Sprinkle' — a stick pack with powder arc, friendly illustration

scene.description: A simple, warm, friendly illustration of a stick pack being torn open with a gentle arc of powder sprinkling down onto a plate of food below. Flat illustration style — NOT realistic, NOT 3D, NOT clinical. Think: the kind of illustration you'd see on a friendly food blog, drawn with warmth and personality. Color palette LOCKED: blue-indigo (#2B2A8C) for the main line art, teal (#5FC0D4) for the powder arc accent, soft lavender (#E8E0F0) background. The stick pack should suggest the DairyAssure packaging shape without trying to render text or logos. Approachable, playful, simple — like the brand itself.

subject.description: A stick pack being torn open, powder sprinkling down in a gentle arc onto a simple plate below. The 'Simple Solutions Only' pillar as an icon.

style.mood: simple, approachable, playful — 'designed for spontaneity' energy

composition.negative_space: generous — icon occupies center 60%, clean background

prompts.purpose: Step 2 icon — 'Eat' — plate with food and fork, same illustration style

scene.description: A simple, warm, friendly illustration of a plate with a slice of pizza on it and a fork beside it. SAME flat illustration style as the Sprinkle icon — MUST be visually identical in style, line weight, color palette, and level of detail. Color palette LOCKED: blue-indigo (#2B2A8C) for main line art, teal (#5FC0D4) for accent elements (fork handle, plate rim detail), soft lavender (#E8E0F0) background. The pizza slice should be simple and appetizing — a happy food illustration, not a technical drawing.

subject.description: A plate with a pizza slice and a fork. Simple, friendly, appetizing. The 'Eat' step — no planning required, just eat.

style.aesthetic: flat_friendly_minimal_warm — IDENTICAL style to Sprinkle icon
style.mood: simple, approachable, YUM — 'eat your meal as you normally would'

composition.negative_space: generous — same proportions as Sprinkle icon

quality.sharpness: crisp, clean edges — same line weight as Sprinkle icon

prompts.purpose: Step 3 icon — 'Enjoy' — celebration moment with sparkles, same illustration style

scene.description: A simple, warm, friendly illustration of a happy smiling face with small sparkles or stars around it — the moment of joy AFTER eating. SAME flat illustration style as the Sprinkle and Eat icons — MUST be visually identical in style, line weight, color palette, and level of detail. Color palette LOCKED: blue-indigo (#2B2A8C) for the face line art, teal (#5FC0D4) for sparkle accents, soft lavender (#E8E0F0) background. The smile should be genuine and warm, not cartoonish or emoji-like. This is the top of the brand ladder: Joy.

subject.description: A simple happy smiling face with sparkle/star accents around it. Pure satisfaction. The 'Enjoy' step — no discomfort, no drama, just joy.

style.aesthetic: flat_friendly_minimal_warm — IDENTICAL style to Sprinkle and Eat icons
style.mood: pure joy, celebration, freedom — 'No discomfort. No drama. Just the meal you wanted.' This is Taste Joy as an icon.

composition.negative_space: generous — same proportions as other icons

quality.sharpness: crisp, clean edges — same line weight as other icons
